headline: Oscar Health Reaffirms 2026 Outlook As Reinsurance And Growth Questions Loom
summary: Oscar Health updated investors at the Raymond James conference, reaffirming its 2026 outlook. Management discussed how it is planning for potential ACA subsidy expiration and capital needs. The company reported stronger than expected open enrollment results and added detail on reinsurance partnerships. Oscar Health, NYSE:OSCR, used the Raymond James conference to give a fuller picture of where the business is headed and how it is handling current market questions. With shares at $13.84 and...
